{{Infobox character
| name = Jerri
| spouse = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Elderspawn summoning ritual]], control her Vessel through contact}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Sleepless]], [[Blackwatch]], [[The Testament]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|, Calder's crew}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Pilot|pilot]], prisoner}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, crew member}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Jerri Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Jerri is a character who serves as a pilot, responsible for navigating through dangerous environments by charting courses using the stars and monitoring various creatures or phenomena. She is originally from [[Vandenyas]] and maintains an alliance with a man named [[Calder]], despite potential disagreements regarding his enemies. Jerri possesses various tattoos consisting of script that travel from her ankle up to her neck. She shares a deep, vital connection to an object known as her [[Vessel]]; being separated from it leaves her feeling incomplete, while possessing it restores her sense of power. Throughout her journey, she has experienced imprisonment in cells and has been cast out by the [[void]] onto an [[island]] within the [[Aion Sea]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten]], known as Jerri, was a [[Sleepless]] and [[Soulbound]] raised by her people after her father, a former [[Sleepless]] leader, left the [[Blackwatch]]. As [[Calder]]'s wife and the pilot responsible for navigating by stars and maps, she worked alongside him to gather intelligence for a prison break. Despite being reported dead following an attack by [[Shera]], Jerri's true nature as a prisoner capable of feeling the [[Heart]]'s influence is revealed. While held in [[Imperial]] custody, she pushed [[Calder]] to steal [[The Testament]] and assisted him in his plans to liberate his father. Her journey involves navigating various dangers, from being caught by [[void]] transmissions to facing a bone-clawed crab within her cell.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">41</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is a name used for [[Jyrine Tessella Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] pulled a dagger.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is [[Calder]]'s wife.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] has tattoos consisting of lines of script on her ankle, shoulder, and neck.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] wears [[emerald]] earrings.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] was the pilot of the ship, responsible for reading maps and stars.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is in danger.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is a character who remembers following her father to a secret meeting as a little girl.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is reported to be dead.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] kept her own secrets and made her own choices.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] worked with [[Calder]] to gather information for a prison break.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is a [[Sleepless]] and a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] died because of [[Shera]]'s attack.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] wonders if they are keeping [[Jerri]] alive.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] begged to accompany [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c15">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is a person whom [[Bliss]] considers a probable source of a transmission.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] was caught by a second void transmission while sleeping.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] has a [[Soulbound Vessel]] and earrings.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is a person whose survival [[Calder]] hopes for.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is a person questioning [[Calder]] about how to open a cell door.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] plans to work with [[Jerri]] to break his father out of prison.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]]'s earrings glint green in the moonlight.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is a prisoner who can feel the influence of the [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is an [[Imperial]] prisoner wearing a standard red shirt and pants.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] has been a [[Soulbound]] for virtually her entire [[life]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri's father]] was a [[Sleepless]] leader.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri's father]] left the [[Blackwatch]] because fellow [[Guild]] members were becoming suspicious.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] was raised by the [[Sleepless]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] was sent to [[Alsa Grayweather]]'s home to study with the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]]'s assignment was to help [[Calder]] break his father out of prison.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] pushed for [[Calder]] to steal [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] wanted to marry [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] found out about [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is a character who thought someone had returned to [[Lucan's cell]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] calls out to her [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] dives into the waters of [[Candle Bay]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] climbed onto the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] shouted from above.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is in prison.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] is a prisoner in a cell being attacked by a bone-clawed crab.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A pilot and companion to [[Calder]], Jerri is a crew member with spidery tattoos on her hand and the ability to produce [[green flame]] from her palm. After participating in the summoning of an [[Elder]] and the destruction of [[Imperial]] property, she was taken as a prisoner in the [[Emperor's quarters]], where she was held in red clothing and shackled with heavy chains. Despite being a [[Vessel]], Jerri remained unimpressed by the [[Sleepless]] acolytes and sought to strike a blow against [[Shera]]. During a chaotic sequence, she sealed a stairway door with alchemical resin and detonated charges, but her efforts ended when [[Shera]] pushed her into the ocean.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">29</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] is someone [[Calder]] has lost.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] responded that they have taken [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] stated that [[Kelarac]] is still free to act.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] was involved in the summoning of an [[Elder]] and the destruction of [[Imperial]] property.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] is a companion of [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri's father]] was a member of the [[Blackwatch]] who went missing.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] has spidery tattoos on her hand.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] is a person on the ship who was urging [[Calder]] to explain [[Nine]]'s actions.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] went to get wine.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] is a prisoner in the [[Emperor's quarters]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] was wearing red prison clothes.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] is someone [[Calder]] would normally wake up to reassure him.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] serves as a pilot on the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] asked if she should kill [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] was unimpressed with the [[Sleepless]] acolytes.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] is a person who may be in danger due to the [[Inquisitors]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] insisted that [[Calder]] use the throne.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] forced his way through the crowd back to [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] tried to persuade [[Calder]] to sit in the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] intends to bring [[Jerri]] forward as a guest.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] wears a secondhand prisoner's uniform.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] is shackled with enough chains to restrain an [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] possesses a [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] can produce [[green flame]] from her hand.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]]'s goal was to strike a blow against [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] is a member of [[Calder]]'s crew who is enthusiastic about the upcoming day.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] sealed the stairway door with alchemical resin.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] detonated charges.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] was pushed into the ocean by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Born Tessella, Jerri was brought to the [[Sleepless]] as a girl by her father, a [[Watchman]] who believed the [[Great Elders]] offered a path to a better world. While serving as a crew member on [[The Testament]], she proved adequate with firearms and a long knife despite being hopeless with a [[sword]]. After being kidnapped by [[Shera]] and imprisoned for betraying [[Calder]], she grew accustomed to [[life]] in cells and eventually performed an [[Elderspawn summoning ritual]] using her own blood. Following the chaos of this ritual, she received the [[Heart of Nakothi]] from the Great One and rose from the [[Aion Sea]] wearing a [[steel blindfold]]. Though she once wore a flawless golden dress, her body was eventually inhabited by [[Kelarac]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">35</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] has tattoos on the left side of her neck and jawline.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri's father]] was a [[Watchman]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] was brought to the [[Sleepless]] by her father when she was a girl.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is a person [[Calder]]'s crew members knew.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is a person mentioned by [[Cheska]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] knelt in the damp basement of a secret meeting-house in the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] was excited about the task and struggled to suppress a grin.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is in prison for betraying [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] was kidnapped by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is a crew member on [[The Testament]] who is adequate with firearms but hopeless with a [[sword]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is a member of the group.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri's Vessel]] communicates via her earring.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is a crew member eager to begin the dash.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] uses a long knife.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] uses a [[pistol]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] cradles [[Calder]]'s head in her lap.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] possesses an earring that flickers green.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] can control her [[Vessel]] through contact.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is someone [[Calder]] remembers.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] has a spidery text tattoo on her jawline, neck, and leg.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is a person [[Dalton Foster]] mentions.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] had seen something in the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] has grown used to spending time in cells.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]]'s maiden name is Tessella.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri's father]] believed the [[Great Elders]] were the path to a better world.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] performs an [[Elderspawn summoning ritual]] using her own blood.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] expected [[Elderspawn]] to cause chaos so she could escape.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is a person who receives the [[Heart of Nakothi]] from the Great One.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] wore a flawless golden dress.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] is on a deck with [[Calder]] and [[Elder worms]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] rose from the [[Aion Sea]] with a blindfold of [[steel]] over her eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]] is inhabiting [[Jerri]]'s body.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]] is in the body of [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] may have been holding back during the battle.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Then how do we get the cell door open?” Jerri asked.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“I call out to you, my Elders, that you may hear my cry. Come to me!”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“We have taken The Testament,” Jerri responded.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Kelarac is still free to act,” Jerri said.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Would you like me to kill her?” Jerri asked, suppressing her delight.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Sleepless]]
[[Category:Blackwatch]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
